scripts.update-news: node scripts/check-news.mjs update-draft && npm run validate
scripts.validate: node --check app.js && node --check sync-status.js && node --check data/incident-data.js && node --check scripts/check-news.mjs && node --check scripts/framework-review.mjs && node --check scripts/validate-data.mjs && node scripts/validate-data.mjs
scripts.validate-with-news: npm run validate && npm run check-news
